case_title: ANN LORETTA RUSSELL VS. LARRY ALLEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RUSSELL, ANN LORETTA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, LARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-06-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, LARRY
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUN-02-2014

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, ANN LORETTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, LARRY THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY WERE NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH AN AGREEMENT FOR PAYMENT OF THE CELL PHONE BILL, INDEPENDENT OF DEFENDANT'S CHILD SUPPORT OBLIGATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, ANN LORETTA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
